name: Eggs Motul Style
recipeInstructions:
1. There should be about half a cup of the shredded cheese.
2. In a large saucepan, soak the beans overnight in the water (or bring to boiling, simmer for 2 minutes, cover and let stand for 1 hour). Do not drain.
3. Add the onion, garlic, and salt. Cook for another 2 hours or until very tender.
4. Combine the undrained tomatoes with the chopped onion, salt, and cayenne pepper.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a large heavy skillet. Mash the beans in the skillet over medium heat for 3 to 5 minutes or until thick.
6. Cook peas according to package directions and drain. Toss with the ham; cover and keep warm.
7. Heat the vegetable oil in another heavy skillet. Fry tortillas 20 to 40 seconds per side or until crisp and golden. Drain on paper towels.
8. Spread about one-third cup of the bean mixture on each tortilla and keep them warm in a 300°F oven.
9. In the same oil, fry eggs until set. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Place an egg on top of each bean-covered tortilla. Sprinkle with the ham mixture.
11. Spoon some tomato sauce over the cheese and serve hot.
